title: Entities table (canonical taxonomy)
description: Hand-authored entity catalogue. Every observation row's entity_id is an FK into this table. Carries entity_type enum per D27 (single entity_id discriminated by type, OWID-precedent), validity windows per D23 (Telangana 2014, J&K/Ladakh 2019 etc.), and parent_entity_id for hierarchy traversal. Authoring shape JSON (D18); pipeline compiles to taxonomy/entities.parquet.

x-changelog.description: Initial canonical entities table schema (Phase 0.3 of TODO/20260517-canonical-long-format-pivot.md). entity_type enum per D27. entity_valid_from/to per D23 — choropleth greys (not hides) entities outside their window. parent_entity_id for hierarchy. entity_level enum drives boundary-file resolution per ADR-0031 §resolution path.

entity_id.description: Stable PK. Convention: 'IN' (country), 'IN-S22' (state, ECI code), 'IN-S22-167' (AC under state), 'IN-S22-D603' (district under state, LGD code with D prefix). All segments uppercase; dash-separated. Never reused.

entity_type.description: Per D27. Discriminator for what kind of thing this row represents. Geographic entities (country/state/ut/district/subdistrict/village/constituency_*) join to boundary files (ADR-0031); fiscal actors (union_govt/state_govt/discom/psu/ministry) do not. ULB = urban local body.

entity_level.description: Resolution axis for choropleth rendering and boundary-file lookup. Geographic entities map to a boundary layer in datasets/manifest.json; fiscal_actor signals 'no geometry, render as table only'.

entity_code.description: The issuing authority's own code (ECI state code 'S22', LGD district code '603', constituency number '167'). Stable handle for the join; never a display name. Per CLAUDE.md §3 identifier convention.

display_name.description: Citizen-readable name (e.g. 'Tamil Nadu', 'Chennai District'). Not an identifier; names drift, codes don't.

display_name_local.description: Optional local-script name (e.g. 'தமிழ்நாடு'). Tooltip / search affordance only.

parent_entity_id.description: FK back into this table for hierarchy traversal. country -> null; state -> 'IN'; district -> 'IN-S22'; AC -> 'IN-S22' (or district). Allows the loader to render breadcrumbs without re-querying.

entity_valid_from.description: Per D23. Year the entity legally came into existence (e.g. Telangana 2014, J&K UT 2019). For pre-1947 / always-existed entities, use 1947 (India formation) or the earliest year the catalogue cares about. Renderer greys (not hides) the entity for observation years < entity_valid_from.

entity_valid_to.description: Per D23. Year the entity ceased to exist (or null if extant). e.g. composite J&K state has entity_valid_to=2019. Renderer greys observation years > entity_valid_to.

iso_3166_2.description: Optional ISO 3166-2 code for states/UTs (e.g. 'IN-TN'). Cross-reference only; entity_code (ECI) is canonical.

lgd_code.description: Optional LGD numeric code for state/district/subdistrict/village. Cross-reference / boundary join key for LGD-keyed GeoJSONs (see docs/architecture/data/boundaries.md).

notes.description: Free-text editorial note (e.g. 'Chengalpattu carved from Kancheepuram in 2019 — parent_lgd_codes=[571,572,587]'). Citizen-facing only when surfaced by renderer.
